text.title: Library Evaluation Rubric Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Library Evaluation Rubric output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: decision based on single axis (e.g., 'fastest in benchmark')

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: candidates populated with a typed value
weights populated with a typed value
bus_factor populated with a typed value
license_check populated with a typed value
bundle_size_pct populated with a typed value
decision populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
